"ancestors": ["android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "pressed": "not_pressed", "text": "Period Tracker, the easiest way to track your periods! Must have Android 2.1 and higher.

Period Tracker is SIMPLE and CUTE.
* Press a button at the start of your period every month. Period Tracker logs your dates and calculates the average of your past 3 months' manstrual cycles to predict the start date of your next period.
* View your current and future period dates, ovulation and fertile days, your moods and your symptoms in a simple month-view calendar.
* Decorate your Android with an icon that looks great on your home screen and that's discreet. It reads simply "P Tracker."

Period Tracker is FILLED WITH FEATURES.
* Take daily notes of menstrual moods and symptoms
* See the number of days until your next period or the number of days late.
* Know when you're fertile with cute icons show on your homescreen during your predicted ovulation and eight day fertile window.
